latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review UI screenshot evidence was captured and is readable.
The generated drawing improved structurally but still fails visual acceptance: final DisplayDim evidence is 11/12 against the reference floor.
Dimensions remain concentrated near the generated front/right view area instead of matching the reference drawing's distributed end-offset, hole-location, and small projected-view callouts.
The right-side projected view and small-feature callout region still differ from the same-name reference.
Generic bottom notes/title information remains visible and does not match the reference sheet presentation.
API pass_with_warning fields are supporting evidence only and do not override this visual FAIL judgement.
